mapper.sql: select detail_id, groupid, subject_id, voucher_id, entry_id, voucher_date, voucher_no, summary, debit_amount, credit_amount, balance, balance_direction, created_time from fin_detail_ledger
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT s.subject_id AS subjectId, s.subject_code AS subjectCode, s.subject_name AS subjectName, s.parent_code AS parentCode, s.subject_level AS subjectLevel, s.is_leaf AS isLeaf FROM fin_accounting_subjects s WHERE s.groupid = #{groupid} AND s.status = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM fin_detail_ledger fdl JOIN fin_accounting_subjects s2 ON s2.subject_id = fdl.subject_id WHERE fdl.groupid = #{groupid} AND fdl.voucher_date >= #{startDate} AND fdl.voucher_date <= #{endDate} AND s2.subject_code LIKE CONCAT(s.subject_code, '%') ) ORDER BY s.subject_code
mapper.insert:
insert into fin_detail_ledger
groupid, subject_id, voucher_id, entry_id, voucher_date, voucher_no, summary, debit_amount, credit_amount, balance, balance_direction, created_time,
#{groupid}, #{subjectId}, #{voucherId}, #{entryId}, #{voucherDate}, #{voucherNo}, #{summary}, #{debitAmount}, #{creditAmount}, #{balance}, #{balanceDirection}, #{createdTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from fin_detail_ledger where detail_id in
#{detailId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t.balance), 0) FROM ( SELECT fdl.balance, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.subject_code ORDER BY fdl.voucher_date DESC, fdl.detail_id DESC) AS rn FROM fin_detail_ledger fdl JOIN fin_accounting_subjects s ON fdl.subject_id = s.subject_id AND fdl.groupid = s.groupid WHERE fdl.groupid = #{groupid} AND s.subject_code LIKE CONCAT(#{parentSubjectCode}, '%') AND fdl.voucher_date < #{startDate} ) t WHERE t.rn = 1
